reasoning: Based on multiple authoritative sources, Apple released an updated Vision Pro on October 15, 2025. Multiple reputable outlets including Ars Technica, MacRumors, and Tom's Guide reported this release. The product features an M5 chip upgrade and was available for purchase starting October 22, 2025, which clearly meets the resolution criteria of being 'available for purchase by the general public within the specified timeframe.' While earlier reports indicated Apple had paused major redesigns, this appears to have been a 'modest update' rather than a complete overhaul, but it still qualifies as a successor product retaining original functions with expanded capabilities (M5 chip, new strap design). The product was released 77 days before the December 31 deadline.
